title: Crovect 1.25% w/v Pour-on Solution for Sheep - Recall alert
body: "We wish to inform wholesalers and SQP retailers that Elanco Animal Health has initiated a Class II recall to wholesaler level with immediate effect for one batch of Crovect 1.25 % w/v pour-on solution for sheep used for GB Vm 52127/5079 & NI Vm 52127/3014  The reason for the recall  is that the colour of the product is paler than usual and does not leave a stain on treated sheep.  This recall is for the below mentioned batch only and no other batches are affected.     Product Batch Number Expiry date     Crovect 1.25 % w/v pour-on solution for sheep 30297 10/2026     Elanco Animal Health is contacting wholesalers and SQP retailers to examine inventory immediately and quarantine products, subject to this recall.  For further information regarding the recall, please contact via email at CustomerService_UK_IE@elancoah.com Alternatively call 01256 353 131. "
